channel.title: Google LLC — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Google LLC (google).

item.title: CVE-2026-15432 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Observable Timing Discrepancy in Tink-Java and Tink-Android ChunkedMacVerification
item.description: When verifying a mac with a ChunkedMacVerification object, Tink compares the resulting tag with non constant time comparison. This potentially allows an attacker to use timinig information as a side channel in order to get information how many bytes…

item.title: CVE-2026-15829 · 8.6 HIGH — SQL Injection and Security Boundary Bypass in googleapis/mcp-toolbox
item.description: A SQL injection (CWE-89) and security boundary bypass (CWE-863) vulnerability exists in the prebuilt BigQuery forecasting tool (bigquery-forecast) of googleapis/mcp-toolbox. The tool accepts client-controlled parameters (data_col, timestamp_col, and…

item.title: CVE-2026-11720 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Path Traversal in googleapis/mcp-toolbox HTTP Tool URL Builder
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in the HTTP tool URL builder of googleapis/mcp-toolbox. When constructing downstream API requests, the URL builder substitutes user-controlled pathParams into the configured tool path and parses the resulting str…

item.title: CVE-2026-12681 · 8.9 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper Validation of Specified Index, Position, or Offset in Input vulnerability in Google go-attestation. parseEfiSignatureList() does not advance the buffer past vendor bytes before reading entries. For hashSHA256SigGUID lists, this allows attack…

item.title: CVE-2026-11719 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: An authenticated authorization bypass vulnerability exists in MCP Toolbox for Databases due to missing scope enforcement across older protocol handlers. While the 2025-11-25 protocol version handler correctly enforces per-tool restrictions defined by…

item.title: CVE-2026-11718 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the generic opaque token validation path (validateOpaqueToken) of googleapis/mcp-toolbox. When the toolbox validates an opaque token via an OAuth 2.0 introspection endpoint (RFC 7662), it decodes the r…

item.title: CVE-2026-11717 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the generic opaque token validation path (validateOpaqueToken) of googleapis/mcp-toolbox. When verifying an unparsed opaque token via an OAuth 2.0 introspection endpoint (RFC 7662), the toolbox decodes…

item.title: CVE-2026-11624 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Model Context Protocol has a security warning advising servers to validate the "Origin" header on all incoming connections to prevent DNS rebinding attacks. Prior to the v0.25.0 release, users had no way to validate the origin's host. In v0.25.0,…

item.title: CVE-2026-9739 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Vulnerable to DNS rebinding attacks when using SSE (http://b/499408790). During the beta phase, we implemented `allowed-origins` and `allowed-hosts` flags to align with MCP security guidelines. However, the hardcoded `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`…

item.title: CVE-2026-8369 · 6 MEDIUM — Improper Input Validation in OpenThread NAT64 Translator
item.description: Improper Input Validation in the NAT64 translator in The OpenThread Authors OpenThread before commit 26a882d on all platforms allows an attacker on the adjacent IPv4 network to inject corrupted IPv6 packets into the Thread mesh or bypass security che…

item.title: CVE-2026-2725 · 6 MEDIUM — Improper Authorization in Gerrit allowing Code Review Bypass via "Submitted Together"
item.description: Incorrect authorization in the "submitted together" feature in Gerrit versions 2.12 and later allows an authenticated attacker with force push permissions on a secondary branch to bypass code review and forcefully submit code to restricted branches v…

item.title: CVE-2026-6409 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Denial of Service (DoS) vulnerability exists in the Protobuf PHP library during the parsing of untrusted input
item.description: A Denial of Service (DoS) vulnerability exists in the Protobuf PHP library during the parsing of untrusted input. Maliciously structured messages—specifically those containing negative varints or deep recursion—can be used to crash the application, i…

item.title: CVE-2026-4092 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Arbitrary File Write via Path Traversal in Google clasp leading to RCE
item.description: Path Traversal in Clasp impacting versions < 3.2.0 allows a remote attacker to perform remote code execution via a malicious Google Apps Script project containing specially crafted filenames with directory traversal sequences.

item.title: CVE-2026-3223 · 8.4 HIGH — Zip Slip leading to Arbitrary File Write and Privilege Escalation in Google Web Designer
item.description: Arbitrary file write & potential privilege escalation exploiting zip slip vulnerability in Google Web Designer.

item.title: CVE-2026-1669 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Arbitrary File Read in Keras via HDF5 External Datasets
item.description: Arbitrary file read in the model loading mechanism (HDF5 integration) in Keras versions 3.0.0 through 3.13.1 on all supported platforms allows a remote attacker to read local files and disclose sensitive information via a crafted .keras model file ut…

item.title: CVE-2025-12474 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — libjxl: Uninitialized memory read in decoder due to incorrect optimization in patch handling
item.description: A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to read pixel data from uninitialized (but allocated) memory. This can be done by causing the decoder to reference an outside-image-bound area in a subsequent patches. An incorrect optimization caus…

item.title: CVE-2026-1837 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — libjxl: Out-of-bounds write in grayscale color transformation when using LCMS2
item.description: A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to write pixel data to uninitialized unallocated memory. Soon after that data from another uninitialized unallocated region is copied to pixel data. This can be done by requesting color transformati…

item.title: CVE-2026-0994 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Denial of Service in Python Protobuf
item.description: A denial-of-service (DoS) vulnerability exists in google.protobuf.json_format.ParseDict() in Python, where the max_recursion_depth limit can be bypassed when parsing nested google.protobuf.Any messages. Due to missing recursion depth accounting insid…

item.title: CVE-2026-1260 · 8.5 HIGH — Invalid Memory Access in Sentencepiece,
item.description: Invalid memory access in Sentencepiece versions less than 0.2.1 when using a vulnerable model file, which is not created in the normal training procedure.

item.title: CVE-2026-0897 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Denial of Service in Keras via Excessive Memory Allocation in HDF5 Metadata
item.description: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in the HDF5 weight loading component in Google Keras 3.0.0 through 3.13.0 on all platforms allows a remote attacker to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) through memory exhaustion and a crash of the P…

item.title: CVE-2025-13437 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Arbitrary node_modules Directory Deletion in Google zx
item.description: When zx is invoked with --prefer-local=<path>, the CLI creates a symlink named ./node_modules pointing to <path>/node_modules. Due to a logic error in src/cli.ts (linkNodeModules / cleanup), the function returns the target path instead of the alias (…

item.title: CVE-2025-13425 · 1.9 LOW — Denial of Service in OSV-SCALIBR
item.description: A bug in the filesystem traversal fallback path causes fs/diriterate/diriterate.go:Next() to overindex an empty slice when ReadDir returns nil for an empty directory, resulting in a panic (index out of range) and an application crash (denial of servi…

item.title: CVE-2025-12060 · 8.9 HIGH — Keras keras.utils.get_file Utility Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: The keras.utils.get_file API in Keras, when used with the extract=True option for tar archives, is vulnerable to a path traversal attack. The utility uses Python's tarfile.extractall function without the filter="data" feature. A remote attacker can c…

item.title: CVE-2025-12058 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Vulnerability in Keras Model.load_model Leading to Arbitrary Local File Loading and SSRF
item.description: The Keras.Model.load_model method, including when executed with the intended security mitigation safe_mode=True, is vulnerable to arbitrary local file loading and Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF). This vulnerability stems from the way the StringLoo…

item.title: CVE-2025-12080 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Intent Abuse in Google Messages for Wear OS for Silent Message Sending
item.description: On Wear OS devices, when Google Messages is configured as the default SMS/MMS/RCS application, the handling of ACTION_SENDTO intents utilizing the sms:, smsto:, mms:, and mmsto: Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) schemes is incorrectly implemented. Du…

item.title: CVE-2025-62496 · 7.1 HIGH — Integer overflow in js_bigint_from_string in QuickJS
item.description: A vulnerability exists in the QuickJS engine's BigInt string parsing logic (js_bigint_from_string) when attempting to create a BigInt from a string with an excessively large number of digits. The function calculates the necessary number of bits (n_bi…

item.title: CVE-2025-62495 · 7.1 HIGH — Type confusion in string addition in QuickJS
item.description: An integer overflow vulnerability exists in the QuickJS regular expression engine (libregexp) due to an inconsistent representation of the bytecode buffer size. * The regular expression bytecode is stored in a DynBuf structure, which correctly uses a…

item.title: CVE-2025-62494 · 7.1 HIGH — Type confusion in string addition in QuickJS
item.description: A type confusion vulnerability exists in the handling of the string addition (+) operation within the QuickJS engine. * The code first checks if the left-hand operand is a string. * It then attempts to convert the right-hand operand to a primitive va…

item.title: CVE-2025-62493 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Heap out-of-bounds read in js_bigint_to_string1 in QuickJS
item.description: A vulnerability exists in the QuickJS engine's BigInt string conversion logic (js_bigint_to_string1) due to an incorrect calculation of the required number of digits, which in turn leads to reading memory past the allocated BigInt structure. * The fu…

item.title: CVE-2025-62492 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Heap out-of-bounds read in js_typed_array_indexOf in QuickJS
item.description: A vulnerability stemming from floating-point arithmetic precision errors exists in the QuickJS engine's implementation of TypedArray.prototype.indexOf() when a negative fromIndex argument is supplied. * The fromIndex argument (read as a double variab…

item.title: CVE-2025-62491 · 8.8 HIGH — Use-after-free in js_std_promise_rejection_check in QuickJS
item.description: A Use-After-Free (UAF) vulnerability exists in the QuickJS engine's standard library when iterating over the global list of unhandled rejected promises (ts->rejected_promise_list). * The function js_std_promise_rejection_check attempts to iterate ove…

item.title: CVE-2025-62490 · 8.8 HIGH — Use-after-free in js_print_object in QuickJS
item.description: In quickjs, in js_print_object, when printing an array, the function first fetches the array length and then loops over it. The issue is, printing a value is not side-effect free. An attacker-defined callback could run during js_print_value, during w…

item.title: CVE-2025-5009 · 1 LOW — Information Disclosure in Gemini iOS App
item.description: In Gemini iOS, when a user shared a snippet of a conversation, it would share the entire conversation via a sharable public link that contained the entire conversation history and not just the snippet.

item.title: CVE-2025-59734 · 8.7 HIGH — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg SANM process_ftch
item.description: It is possible to cause an use-after-free write in SANM decoding with a carefully crafted animation using subversion <2. When a STOR chunk is present, a subsequent FOBJ chunk will be saved in ctx->stored_frame. Stored frames can later be referenced b…

item.title: CVE-2025-59733 · 8.7 HIGH — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg EXR dwa_uncompress
item.description: When decoding an OpenEXR file that uses DWAA or DWAB compression, there's an implicit assumption that all image channels have the same pixel type (and size), and that if there are four channels, the first four are "B", "G", "R" and "A". The channel p…

item.title: CVE-2025-59732 · 8.7 HIGH — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg EXR dwa_uncompress
item.description: When decoding an OpenEXR file that uses DWAA or DWAB compression, there's an implicit assumption that the height and width are divisible by 8. If the height or width of the image is not divisible by 8, the copy loops at [0] and [1] will continue to w…

item.title: CVE-2025-59731 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg EXR dwa_uncompress
item.description: When decoding an OpenEXR file that uses DWAA or DWAB compression, the specified raw length of run-length-encoded data is not checked when using it to calculate the output data. We read rle_raw_size from the input file at [0], we decompress and decode…

item.title: CVE-2025-59730 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg SANM decoding due to lack of bounds-checking in old_codec48
item.description: When decoding a frame for a SANM file (ANIM v0 variant), the decoded data can be larger than the buffer allocated for it. Frames encoded with codec 48 can specify their resolution (width x height). A buffer of appropriate size is allocated depending…

item.title: CVE-2025-59729 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Heap-buffer-overflow read in FFmpeg DHAV get_duration
item.description: When parsing the header for a DHAV file, there's an integer underflow in offset calculation that leads to reading the duration from before the start of the allocated buffer. If we load a DHAV file that is larger than MAX_DURATION_BUFFER_SIZE bytes (0…

item.title: CVE-2025-59728 · 8.7 HIGH — Heap-buffer-overflow write in FFmpeg MDASH resolve_content_path
item.description: When calculating the content path in handling of MPEG-DASH manifests, there's an out-of-bounds NUL-byte write one byte past the end of the buffer.When we call xmlNodeGetContent below [0], it returns a buffer precisely allocated to match the string le…

item.title: CVE-2025-9905 · 7.3 HIGH — Arbitary Code execution in Keras load_model()
item.description: The Keras Model.load_model method can be exploited to achieve arbitrary code execution, even with safe_mode=True. One can create a specially crafted .h5/.hdf5 model archive that, when loaded via Model.load_model, will trigger arbitrary code to be exe…

item.title: CVE-2025-9906 · 8.6 HIGH — Arbitrary Code execution in Keras Safe Mode
item.description: The Keras Model.load_model method can be exploited to achieve arbitrary code execution, even with safe_mode=True. One can create a specially crafted .keras model archive that, when loaded via Model.load_model, will trigger arbitrary code to be execut…

item.title: CVE-2025-9951 · 7.2 HIGH — Remote code execution via Heap Buffer Overflow in FFmpeg JPEG2000
item.description: A heap-buffer-overflow write exists in jpeg2000dec FFmpeg which allows an attacker to potentially gain remote code execution or cause denial of service via the channel definition cdef atom of JPEG2000.

item.title: CVE-2025-7709 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Out Of Bounds write in FTS5 Extension in SQLite
item.description: An integer overflow exists in the FTS5 https://sqlite.org/fts5.html extension. It occurs when the size of an array of tombstone pointers is calculated and truncated into a 32-bit integer. A pointer to partially controlled data can then be written out…

item.title: CVE-2025-8747 · 8.6 HIGH — Keras safe_mode bypass allows arbitrary code execution when loading a malicious model.
item.description: A safe mode bypass vulnerability in the `Model.load_model` method in Keras versions 3.0.0 through 3.10.0 allows an attacker to achieve arbitrary code execution by convincing a user to load a specially crafted `.keras` model archive.

item.title: CVE-2025-8192 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Race condition in AndroidTV TvSettings
item.description: There exists a TOCTOU race condition in TvSettings AppRestrictionsFragment.java that lead to start of attacker supplied activity in Settings’ context, i.e. system-uid context, thus lead to launchAnyWhere. The core idea is to utilize the time window b…

item.title: CVE-2025-7458 · 6.9 MEDIUM — SQLite integer overflow in key info allocation may lead to information disclosure.
item.description: An integer overflow in the sqlite3KeyInfoFromExprList function in SQLite versions 3.39.2 through 3.41.1 allows an attacker with the ability to execute arbitrary SQL statements to cause a denial of service or disclose sensitive information from proces…

item.title: CVE-2025-6965 · 7.2 HIGH — Integer Truncation on SQLite
item.description: There exists a vulnerability in SQLite versions before 3.50.2 where the number of aggregate terms could exceed the number of columns available. This could lead to a memory corruption issue. We recommend upgrading to version 3.50.2 or above.

item.title: CVE-2025-7021 · 6.9 MEDIUM — OpenAI Operator - API Spoofing through Locking Operator on FullScreen
item.description: Fullscreen API Spoofing and UI Redressing in the handling of Fullscreen API and UI rendering in OpenAI Operator SaaS on Web allows a remote attacker to capture sensitive user input (e.g., login credentials, email addresses) via displaying a deceptive…

item.title: CVE-2025-5981 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Arbitrary File write in OSV-SCALIBR
item.description: Arbitrary file write as the OSV-SCALIBR user on the host system via a path traversal vulnerability when using OSV-SCALIBR's unpack() function for container images. Particularly, when using the CLI flag --remote-image on untrusted container images.
